statement.en: MODELLING THE USE OF TECHNOLOGY TO IMPROVE DEGRADED LAND AND BIOMASS DENSITY

proposer: Deepika Marwar, Alok Malviya, Maninder Singh Arora

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a preprint (dated 2026-04-25) modeling technology applications for land restoration. The core claims are provisional—dependent on validation of computational models, field data, and empirical outcomes. The intersection of AI, environmental science, and land management involves both established principles and emergent applications not yet peer-reviewed or operationally proven.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 技術の指数的な力が、時間とともに退化を逆転させ、緑を蘇らせる。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 荒地から技術の光が立ち上り、生命は再び根を張る。
